content.text:
All checks pass. Here's what the fix does:

**The problem:** After Google OAuth callback, better-auth redirects to `APP_URL + callbackURL` which is `http://localhost:4010/`. In local dev, the API has no frontend assets, so it returns "Not found".

**The fix** (line 129-136 of `apps/api/src/index.ts`): When the SPA `index.html` fallback doesn't exist (local dev) and `ALLOWED_ORIGIN` differs from `APP_URL`, redirect unmatched routes to the frontend dev server. This mirrors the SPA fallback behavior that works in production — instead of serving `index.html`, it redirects to wherever the frontend is running.

This only activates when:
- No static `index.html` exists (dev mode, not production)
- `ALLOWED_ORIGIN` is different from `APP_URL` (separate frontend server)

So your flow will now be: Google callback hits `:4010/api/auth/callback/google` → better-auth processes it, sets cookies, redirects to `http://localhost:4010/` → API redirects to `http://localhost:4011/` → frontend loads with the session cookie already set.

1→# ============================================================================
     2→# Rudel — Environment Variables
     3→# ============================================================================
     4→# Copy this file to .env and fill in the values.
     5→# For local development with Docker (bun run dev:local), all defaults work
     6→# out of the box — you only need to set BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.
     7→# ============================================================================
     8→
     9→# --- Required ----------------------------------------------------------------
    10→
    11→# Postgres connection string (Neon in production, local Docker in dev)
    12→PG_CONNECTION_STRING=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/rudel
    13→
    14→# Auth secret used by better-auth for signing tokens/cookies.
    15→# Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32
    16→BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=
    17→
    18→# --- ClickHouse ---------------------------------------------------------------
    19→# For local dev, the Docker container (bun run dev:local) provides ClickHouse.
    20→# For hosted ClickHouse, get credentials at https://obsessiondb.com
    21→
    22→# ClickHouse HTTP endpoint. Local Docker uses port 8123; production is behind
    23→# a reverse proxy on port 443 (https://...).
    24→CLICKHOUSE_URL=http://localhost:8123
    25→
    26→# ClickHouse credentials. The API accepts both CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME and
    27→# CLICKHOUSE_USER (prefers CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME). Local Docker default password
    28→# is "clickhouse".
    29→CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME=default
    30→CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=
    31→
    32→# ClickHouse database name. Used by chkit tooling for schema migrations.
    33→# Not read by the API at runtime (hardcoded to "rudel" in queries).
    34→# CLICKHOUSE_DB=rudel
    35→
    36→# --- API Server ---------------------------------------------------------------
    37→
    38→# Base URL of the API server. Used as better-auth's baseURL and automatically
    39→# added to trusted origins. Default: http://localhost:4010
    40→# APP_URL=http://localhost:4010
    41→
    42→# CORS allowed origin. Requests with a different Origin header won't get CORS
    43→# headers. Default: http://localhost:4011
    44→# ALLOWED_ORIGIN=http://localhost:4011
    45→
    46→# Comma-separated list of trusted origins for better-auth CSRF protection.
    47→# APP_URL is automatically appended. Default: http://localhost:4011
    48→# TRUSTED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:4011
    49→
    50→# Server listen port. Default: 4010. Overridden to 3000 in the Docker image.
    51→# PORT=4010
    52→
    53→# Directory for static file serving (SPA). Relative to apps/api/.
    54→# In production, the web app is built and copied to apps/api/public/.
    55→# Default: public
    56→# STATIC_DIR=public
    57→
    58→# --- OAuth Providers (optional) -----------------------------------------------
    59→# Enable social login by providing OAuth credentials. If not set, only
    60→# email/password authentication is available.
    61→
    62→# Google OAuth
    63→# GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=
    64→# GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=
    65→
    66→# GitHub OAuth
    67→# GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=
    68→# GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=
    69→
    70→# --- Integrations (optional) --------------------------------------------------
    71→
    72→# Slack incoming webhook URL. When set, sends a notification to the channel
    73→# on every new user signup.
    74→# SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL=https://hooks.slack.com/services/...
    75→

1→#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2→set -e
     3→
     4→# 1. Start Postgres + ClickHouse (idempotent)
     5→docker compose up -d --wait
     6→
     7→# 2. Run Postgres migrations (idempotent — skips already-applied)
     8→PG_CONNECTION_STRING=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/rudel \
     9→  bun run --cwd packages/sql-schema migrate
    10→
    11→# 3. Start API + Web in parallel with local env vars
    12→export PG_CONNECTION_STRING=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/rudel
    13→export BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=local-dev-secret-that-is-at-least-32-chars-long
    14→export CLICKHOUSE_URL=http://localhost:8123
    15→export REDACTED
    16→export APP_URL=http://localhost:4011
    17→
    18→# Run API and Web in parallel, kill both on Ctrl+C
    19→bun --watch apps/api/src/index.ts &
    20→API_PID=$!
    21→bun run --cwd apps/web dev &
    22→WEB_PID=$!
    23→
    24→trap "kill $API_PID $WEB_PID 2>/dev/null" EXIT
    25→wait
    26→

gh pr create --base main --title "fix: redirect to frontend dev server when processing OAuth callbacks" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
Fixes OAuth redirect flow in local development when the frontend and API run on separate ports. When `ALLOWED_ORIGIN` differs from `APP_URL` (e.g., frontend on :4011, API on :4010), unmatched non-API routes now redirect to the frontend instead of returning 404.

## Problem
During Google OAuth sign-in, better-auth was redirecting to `APP_URL/` (the API server) which has no SPA frontend in local dev, causing "Not found" errors instead of completing the auth flow.

## Solution
Added a redirect before the final 404 that sends unmatched routes to `ALLOWED_ORIGIN` when running in dev mode with separate frontend and API servers. This preserves the production behavior (serving `index.html`) while supporting local development with Vite on a different port.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

Done! PR created: https://github.com/obsessiondb/rudel/pull/65

**What was fixed:**
- When you log in with Google in local dev, better-auth now correctly redirects to the frontend on `:4011` instead of returning "Not found" on the API at `:4010`
- Added a dev-mode redirect that routes unmatched non-API requests to `ALLOWED_ORIGIN` when it differs from `APP_URL` (separate frontend and API servers)
